---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the software
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen. If it touches the companion, note how it preserves
the Covenant (local-first, absolute pause, memory ownership — see
`docs/governance/Development-Standards.md`).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Scope check**
Is this Built-layer work (code, tests) or Vision-layer (mythos, art,
story)? Vision-layer contributions have their own template.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or sketches here.
